productDisplayName: Femella Women Blue Polka Bow Dress Dress
description: Style Note This blue polka dot dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, the slim belt, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion.  Product Details Blue polka dot dress made of blended fabric, has a round neck, is sleeveless, has bow detailing on the chest and zipper closure at the back Material and Care Blended fabric Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Size and Fit
